headline: IP Boosts Footprint With Converting Facility Acquisition in Dover
summary: International Paper acquires Delmarva Corrugated Packaging in Dover to expand its East Coast footprint and strengthen sustainable packaging capacity.

raw.headline: IP Boosts Footprint With Converting Facility Acquisition in Dover

headline: International Paper acquires Delmarva Corrugated Packaging
summary: The company said the purchase fits its plan to “maximise” value for customers, shareholders and employees.

raw.headline: International Paper acquires Delmarva Corrugated Packaging
raw.summary: The company said the purchase fits its plan to “maximise” value for customers, shareholders and employees.

headline: International Paper Expands Sustainable Packaging Reach With Delmarva Acquisition
summary: International Paper (NYSE:IP) is acquiring Delmarva Corrugated Packaging to expand its sustainable packaging footprint. The deal adds corrugated production capacity and broadens International Paper's reach in fiber-based, recyclable packaging solutions. For investors watching International Paper at a share price of $30.4, this acquisition arrives after a period of weaker recent stock performance. The stock is down 6.4% over the past week, 18.1% over the past month, 24.5% year to date, and...
